text:
Top 15 Online Interview Tools For Employers

This article reviews 15 interview platforms designed to help employers conduct structured, efficient hiring processes. The platforms range from AI-powered video interview tools to comprehensive talent assessment systems.

WeCP (We Create Problems) leads the list as a complete talent assessment platform offering 'live, asynchronous, and panel interviews supported across roles in tech, business, marketing, operations, and customer support.' Notable capabilities include integrated skills testing, AI-powered proctoring through Sherlock, and ATS integrations.

Other prominent tools include: HireVue: Emphasizes on-demand video interviews and AI-based candidate analysis; Codility: Specializes in technical hiring with real-time pair programming; Harver: Focuses on high-volume hiring with behavioral assessments; Talview: Combines interviews, assessments, and proctoring in unified workflow.

The article emphasizes that modern interview tools go beyond scheduling. They provide 'structure, consistency, and insight into every conversation,' helping teams make evidence-based hiring decisions rather than relying on intuition alone.

The platforms collectively address key hiring challenges: reducing time-to-hire, minimizing bias, enabling remote collaboration, and validating both technical skills and soft skills across diverse roles and industries.
